response.original_title: お風呂を出たら、旦那の家族が全員集合してました。～家族風呂輪姦～ ももの真利奈
response.overview: I was going back to my husband's family home for a memorial service. My grandmother had passed away, and now only my father-in-law, uncle, and brothers-in-law live there—a family of men only, which I had always longed for, as I have no siblings. However, my husband's family didn't see it that way. I was the only woman in a house full of men...no matter how much of a wife I was to the family, they saw me as nothing more than a "female." And then, something happened when I was taking a bath. My uncle came into the bathroom. The moment he saw my body, he turned into a beast. And seeing that, the other family members followed suit and attacked me as well...
response.title: When I Got Out Of The Bath, My Husband's Whole Family Was There. ~Family Bath Gangbang~  Momono Marina
